arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the FSx OpenZFS snapshot.

creation_time.description: The time when the FSx OpenZFS snapshot was created.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the FSx OpenZFS snapshot.

snapshot_id.description: The specific ID of the FSx OpenZFS snapshot.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the FSx OpenZFS snapshot.

volume_id.description: The ID of the volume from which the FSx OpenZFS snapshot was created.
